common.tagline: Science-led skincare, crafted to be loved.

hero.title: Radiance, rooted in science
hero.subtitle: Discover Dermovive's curated skincare and cosmetics — formulated by pharmacists, loved by skin.

featured.title: Find your ritual
featured.body: From gentle cleansers to targeted treatments, every formula is built around real skin needs.

featured.title: Featured favourites
featured.subtitle: The formulas our community reaches for first.

newest.subtitle: Fresh additions to the Dermovive ritual.

who.title: A skincare laboratory, built on science
who.body: Dermovive Pharma is a cosmetics laboratory specializing in the development and manufacturing of skincare products. We deliver innovative solutions that combine efficacy, safety and premium-quality ingredients — tailored to the needs of African and international markets.

vision.label: Our Vision
vision.body: To empower self-confidence through safe, effective products formulated with natural ingredients that enhance skin health and reveal natural beauty — expanding across West Africa by 2030 as a trusted leader in cosmetics.

mission.label: Our Mission
mission.body: To become the preferred choice for women worldwide by offering innovative, sustainable and affordable skincare — high-quality products at accessible prices for all, while celebrating diversity and natural beauty.

story.title: Pharmacy-grade care, beautifully made
story.body: Dermovive blends clinical research with sensorial luxury. Clean, effective, and kind to every skin type.

home.comingSoon: Our full catalog is being prepared. The complete product experience is coming soon.

product.commerceNote: Online ordering is coming soon. Reach out and our team will be glad to help you.

science.title: Science-led
science.body: Every formula is developed by pharmacists and grounded in dermatological research.

clean.title: Clean & kind
clean.body: Thoughtfully sourced ingredients — cruelty-free and gentle on every skin type.

trilingual.title: Care in your language
trilingual.body: Guidance and labels in Arabic, English and French, so skincare feels personal.

tested.title: Dermatologically tested
tested.body: Rigorously tested formulas you can trust, for visible results without compromise.

about.ctaBody: Explore skincare and cosmetics crafted by pharmacists and loved by skin.
